name: service-intake-150
description: Production-like sandbox conversation mix for 150 real Agentforce runtime conversations.
channelRequirement: Agentforce Service Agent connected to Messaging, Enhanced Web Chat, Agent API, or BYOC.
conversationGuidance: Customer identifies the case number or email address.
Agent asks at least one clarifying question.
Agent uses configured case action to find, update, or create a Case.
Conversation ends with a resolution, escalation, deferral, or abandoned path.
